'''lathuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ignitor|ignitor]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-th-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ignitor|ignitor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lathuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læthithith|læthithith]] || [[word:læthithij|læthithij]] || [[word:læthithish|læthithish]] || [[word:læthithi|læthithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lathuthuthuth|lathuthuthuth]] || [[word:lathuthuthuj|lathuthuthuj]] || [[word:lathuthuthush|lathuthuthush]] || [[word:lathuthuthu|lathuthuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lathuthuth|lathuthuth]] || [[word:lathuthuj|lathuthuj]] || [[word:lathuthush|lathuthush]] || [[word:lathuthu|lathuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lathufthuth|lathufthuth]] || [[word:lathufthuj|lathufthuj]] || [[word:lathufthush|lathufthush]] || [[word:lathufthuf|lathufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lathuthuthu|lathuthuthu]] || [[word:lathuthuju|lathuthuju]] || [[word:lathuthushu|lathuthushu]] || [[word:lathuthuku|lathuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lathuthuth|lathuthuth]] || [[word:lathuthuj|lathuthuj]] || [[word:lathuthush|lathuthush]] || [[word:lathuthu|lathuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lathuthuthul|lathuthuthul]] || [[word:lathuthujul|lathuthujul]] || [[word:lathuthushul|lathuthushul]] || [[word:lathuthukul|lathuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lathuthuthuthu|lathuthuthuthu]] || [[word:lathuthujuju|lathuthujuju]] || [[word:lathuthushushu|lathuthushushu]] || [[word:lathuthuku|lathuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lathuthuthun|lathuthuthun]] || [[word:lathuthujun|lathuthujun]] || [[word:lathuthushun|lathuthushun]] || [[word:lathuthukun|lathuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lathuthuthuoro|lathuthuthuoro]] || [[word:lathuthujuoro|lathuthujuoro]] || [[word:lathuthushuoro|lathuthushuoro]] || [[word:lathuthukuoro|lathuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
